sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_array_join (id UInt32, cities Array(String), browsers Array(String)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT arrayJoin(cities) AS city, count() AS impression_count FROM test_array_join GROUP BY city HAVING impression_count < 5;
SELECT arrayJoin(arrayZip(cities, browsers)) AS pair, sum(id) AS total FROM test_array_join GROUP BY pair HAVING (pair.1 < 'London' AND pair.2 = 'Firefox');

SELECT arrayJoin(browsers) AS browser, a.id, sum(a.id) FROM (SELECT id, arrayJoin(cities) AS city FROM test_array_join) AS a WHERE a.city IN (SELECT arrayJoin(cities) FROM test_array_join WHERE id < 3) GROUP BY browser, a.id;
SELECT sum(CASE WHEN arrayJoin(cities) < 'Berlin' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS below_berlin_count, avg(arrayJoin([1, 2, 3, 4]) < 3) AS avg_less_than_3 FROM test_array_join;
SELECT arrayJoin(arrayConcat(cities, ['New York'])) AS city, count() FROM (SELECT arrayJoin(cities) AS cities FROM test_array_join WHERE arrayJoin(browsers) = 'Chrome') GROUP BY city ORDER BY city;
SELECT DISTINCT city, browser FROM (SELECT arrayJoin(cities) AS city, arrayJoin(browsers) AS browser FROM test_array_join) WHERE city < 'Paris' AND browser NOT IN ('Chrome', NULL) ORDER BY city;
SELECT id, arrayJoin(cities) AS city, arrayJoin(browsers) AS browser FROM test_array_join WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_array_join WHERE arrayJoin(browsers) < 'Safari');
CREATE TABLE temp_table (source UInt32, numbers Array(UInt32)) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT arrayJoin(arraySort(numbers)) AS sorted_num, count() FROM temp_table GROUP BY sorted_num HAVING sorted_num < 15 OR sorted_num IS NULL;
